business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial construction contractor (carpentry, electrical, plumbing, masonry, painting, project management)

coverages_discussed.notes: Experience Modification Factor of 0.86 effective 08/01/2025; Total payroll $31,094,800; Expected Losses $1,095,520

positives: Experience modification factor of 0.86 indicates better-than-average loss experience
Actual incurred losses ($548,454) significantly below expected losses ($1,095,520)
concerns: High claim frequency in 2021-2022 policy year (10 claims)
Construction trades classifications carry elevated loss rates (masonry 4.80, painting 3.20, plumbing 2.40)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 20 total claims over 3-year experience period (2021-2024) with $546,731 paid, $548,454 incurred, $335,671 primary losses, and $212,733 excess losses.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: This experience rating modification worksheet has been reviewed and approved in accordance with applicable state rating laws and regulations. The experience modification factor of 0.86 is effective as of 08/01/2025.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Classifications include Carpentry NOC (5403), Electrical Wiring (5190), Plumbing NOC (5183), Masonry NOC (5022), Painting Interior (5474), Contractors Project Manager/Superintendent (5606), and Clerical Office Employees NOC (8810).
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Policy Year 2023-2024: 7 claims, $190,770 paid, $191,231 incurred. Policy Year 2022-2023: 3 claims, $115,267 paid, $116,479 incurred. Policy Year 2021-2022: 10 claims, $240,694 paid, $240,694 incurred.
